tool-error-throw.rule: all operational errors inside the orchestrator loop use `throw new ToolError("CODE", message)` where CODE is a member of AgentMcpErrorCode; raw Error objects are never thrown past the orchestrator boundary

policy-before-dispatch.rule: policy.check() is called for each tool call before client.callTool() is invoked; the check reads the current toolCallCount which must already reflect this dispatch
